case_title: MARTIN, JAMES R. vs. BEST MODELS SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JAMES R. AS TO DEFENDANT BEST MODELS SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JAMES R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST MODELS SAN FRANCISCO, INC. $4,799.82 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,879.82
